news.summary: <p>ISLAMABAD: Pakistan is set to take a series of major measures —including weekly petroleum price revision, compensating oil companies for elevated costs of insurance and import premiums, and fuel conservation measures like mandatory work from home — to keep the markets liquid amid the drying

news.headline: Curfew lifted in Gilgit, continues in Skardu
news.summary:
<p>GILGIT: Curfew has been lifted in Gilgit city, while it will remain in force in Skardu until further notice.</p>
<p>According to a statement issued by Gilgit-Baltistan police on Wednesday, the curfew in Gilgit was lifted in view of public cooperation. However, security will rema

news.headline: Why #SEAblings became Southeast Asia’s symbol of digital solidarity
news.summary: #SEAblings – short for “Southeast Asian siblings” – has increasingly been used by young Southeast Asians to signal regional solidarity, be it over a controversial concert or a political event.
